THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF OLSEN, TOM OLSEN, NAOMI RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT YOUNG, EDITH $5,000.00 PRINCIPAL, $50.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $5,050.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT CROSS COMPLAINANT YOUNG, EDITH IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY CROSS DEFENDANT OLSEN, TOM OLSEN, NAOMI STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
PURSUANT TO THE STIPULATION TO CAUSE SMALL CLAIMS APPEAL TO BE DISMISSED AND SMALL CLAIMS JUDGMENT TO BE VACATED, FILED HEREIN, AND GOOD CAUSE
EXISTING THEREFOR, THE CLERK OF THIS COURT, SMALL CLAIMS DIVISION, IS HEREBY ORDERED TO VACATE THE JUDGMENT IN THIS ACTION
